summary: Backend-only re-audit for P0 Indodax v2 mode wiring, env-driven callback server, nginx renderer, lifecycle integration, and runtime regression completed. lint/build and all targeted probes passed.
action_items: Keep indodax_history_v2_probe.ts and private_api_v2_mapping_probe.ts as mandatory regression gates for INDODAX_HISTORY_MODE behavior.
Keep http_servers_probe.ts and app_lifecycle_servers_probe.ts in CI to protect callback/app startup-shutdown integration and env wiring.
Plan modular split of executionEngine.ts (>700 lines) after P0 hardening to reduce regression blast radius.
critical_code_review_comments: executionEngine.ts remains very large (1500+ lines), combining reconciliation, execution, and summary side-effects in one class; high regression risk for future P0 changes.
No blocking mismatch found between README/.env.example/REFACTOR_LOG.md/SESSION_CONTEXT_NEXT.md and current implementation for this scope.
seed_data_creation: No persistent seed data. Isolated DATA_DIR under /tmp used per probe run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Executed and passed with TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN=testtoken and TELEGRAM_ALLOWED_USER_IDS=1: yarn lint, yarn build, runtime_backend_regression, worker_timeout_probe, live_execution_hardening_probe, execution_summary_failed_probe, telegram_menu_navigation_probe, telegram_slippage_confirmation_probe, indodax_history_v2_probe, private_api_v2_mapping_probe, http_servers_probe, nginx_renderer_probe, and new app_lifecycle_servers_probe. NOTE: several probes use MOCKED exchange/Telegram harnesses by design; http_servers/nginx renderer probes use real local HTTP process behavior.
rca of the issue: No blocker reproduced in this iteration. P0 wiring validated: v2 method availability + mode-based caller selection, callback env-drive + health + persistence, startup/shutdown connectivity, and nginx env rendering all behaved as expected in local probe scope.
